privileged_info_summary: Completed PI audit for manageservice_env sla_compliance_problem_management task by confirming that the task uses synthetically generated service requests injected into the ManageEngine ServiceDesk Plus PostgreSQL database via task_utils.sh. Verified that the expected target ticket IDs (1001, 1003, 1004) correspond exactly to the High-priority requests created. Furthermore, verified the expected status "In Progress", target technician "administrator", and the required problem title based on the prompt instructions, noting that the verifier.py logic uses more lenient checks for these values.
